title: AI Research Mentee (Multilingual Agentic Evaluation)

title: AI Research Mentee (Chain-of-thought Monitoring)
description: Lead project studying the boundaries of weak-to-strong chain-of-thought monitoring on safety-relevant evals (WMDP & SWEBench-Verified) using sandbagging as a case study.

title: ML Research Assistant
